docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-15-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER WADSWORTH, JENNI ZHOU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2002 ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERKS: P.DIAS/J. STOKES; REPORTER: HELEN A. SOREP-MATLEY.

parties.name: WADSWORTH, JENNI ZHOU 255 KALMANOVITZ ST. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Oct-17-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P.Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Helen A. Sorep-Matley. The Court ordered the matter off calendar due to a defective petition on file. Petitioner advised to file and amended petition.
